color_palette.background_app: bg-yellow-50 (#FFFBEB) - Soft pale yellow to fulfill the 70% yellow ratio while maintaining readability
color_palette.background_sidebar: bg-yellow-400 (#FACC15) - Bold brand yellow for structural identity
color_palette.background_surface: bg-white (#FFFFFF) - 20% white for all data cards and functional surfaces
color_palette.primary: bg-yellow-500 (#EAB308) - For primary actions on white surfaces
color_palette.success: bg-emerald-500 (#10B981) - 5% green for income, profits, and positive stock levels
color_palette.danger: bg-rose-500 (#F43F5E) - 5% red for expenses and low stock alerts
color_palette.text_primary: text-neutral-900 (#171717) - High contrast against yellow and white
color_palette.text_secondary: text-neutral-500 (#737373) - For subtitles and less important data
color_palette.border: border-yellow-200 (#FEF08A) - For separating content within the app

layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Control Room Grid (Dense, Scanable): grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-xl for cards, rounded-md for inputs/buttons
layout_and_spacing.shadows: shadow-sm for cards to lift them off the pale yellow background

micro_themes.sidebar: Flat solid yellow-400 background, black text/icons. No gradients. Active item gets a white background or stark black background with yellow text.
micro_themes.cards: Solid white background, 1px border-yellow-200. Clean, flat look.
micro_themes.buttons: Primary: Solid black or bold yellow. Danger: Solid rose. Success: Solid emerald. Always add hover states (e.g., hover:opacity-90).

component_instructions.charts: Use Recharts. For the ML Prediction chart, use a LineChart with two lines: one solid for historical data, and one dashed for the LSTM predicted data. Use neutral-900 for history and emerald-500 for prediction.
component_instructions.tables: Use Shadcn Table component. Left-align data, right-align numbers/currency. Ensure alternating row colors or subtle bottom borders (border-yellow-100) for readability.
component_instructions.forms: Use Shadcn Form, Input, Select. Labels must be text-sm font-semibold text-neutral-900.
component_instructions.authentication: Split screen layout: Left side full-height image (login_background), right side white form centered.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Buttons must have hover states (translate-y-[-1px] or opacity change).
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Use transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out for buttons and links.
motion_and_interaction.loading: Use simple CSS spinners or skeleton loaders (bg-yellow-200 animate-pulse).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text-neutral-900 is used over yellow-400 and yellow-50 backgrounds.
accessibility.data_testid: ALL interactive elements must include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='sidebar-nav-investor')

login_background.description: Minimalist bright yellow wall with shadow, perfect for login screen half-page background.

logo_placeholder.description: Abstract intersecting black and yellow paper strips, use as a brand visual or logo placeholder.

printing_machine_accent.description: Industrial machine aesthetic, can be used for empty states or dashboard banners.

iconography.instructions: Use consistent stroke-width (usually 2). Use Icons for sidebar navigation (e.g., LayoutDashboard, Receipt, Package, BookOpen, Users, TrendingUp).

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize standard React app with Tailwind CSS.
Set up React Router for authentication and dashboard layout.
Build a persistent Sidebar navigation with Yellow (70% feel) background.
Create Dashboard home with Bento Grid for Summary, Stock, Cash, and ML Prediction.
Build CRUD pages (Tables + Modals/Forms) for Transaksi, Stok, Kas, Investor, and Akun.
Implement the LSTM Forecasting visualization using Recharts (Line chart with distinct styling for predictions).
Ensure the green (5%) and red (5%) colors are used strictly for financial positive/negative indicators and stock alerts.
